prompt: I want to add a new custom field in InfluencerSoft called 'referral_source'. Anything I should know before I do it?

assertions.text: Warns about prefix-slug collision: IS rejects names sharing a prefix with an existing field
Mentions the stale UI error: the form holds the error from the previous attempt and reports the LAST collision, so refresh the page between adds
References the existing custom-field naming convention: short distinct stems (sku_code, sku_label, bought_on, order_ref, xsell_name, xsell_url, pack_name)
Gives the exact menu path: Contacts → Custom Fields
Recommends a shorter or differently-prefixed name (e.g., ref_src, source_ref) to reduce collision risk with future fields
